details.IncidentDetail: "[24] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1179-Trfc Collision-1141 Enrt to 1182-Trfc Collision-No Inj by CHP [Shared]"

"[6] DRK SUV ON THE WB LANE "
"[5] BUNCH OF STUFF ON THE HIGHWAY BUT VEHS ARE ON THE RHS "
"[3] PEOPLE OUTSIDE OF THE VEH W"
"[2] 34-P5 PV: 1710803 AND BM 9498 ---- TILL APPROX 1400 HRS "

Log.Location: "I80 W SR12 W CON / GREEN VALLEY RD ONR"

details.IncidentDetail: "[40] XPOST COMPLETED // NO SIG ALERT DUE TO BEING ON RAMP"
"[34] ISSUE SIG ALERT AND XPOST: PER S2 - RAMP WILL BE SHUT DOWN FOR SEVERAL HRS ------ JUST GREEN VALLEY ONR TO WB 80 // THE CONNECTOR TO WB 12 REMAINS OPEN"
"[32] INFO FOR HEAVY TOW * 15K LB AND 28 FT TRAILER"
"[30] 80 1097 GV ONRAMP TO WB 80 **** CLOSING GREEN VALLEY ONR TO WB 80 "
"[28] RUNNING INVD PTYS CELL IN RAPID -- HE'S PINGING GRN VLY ONR TO THE WB 12/WB 80 CON"
"[25] POSS GV ONR TO WB 12 OR WB 80 "
"[18] 83 - REQ WE INQ IF IT IS LOADED AND IF SO START HVY TOW "
"[7] [Rotation Request Comment] 1039 ACTION TOW 408-988-4774 * ENRT W/ FLTBD"
"[3] CLARIFY LINE 2 - SO HAS STARTED FIRE "
"[1] SGT MURPHY 21330 W/ OFFICER HYER 21398 TILL 1300 I-80 E/B CARQUINEZ BRIDGE PV 1548662 BM 72648"
"[9] PER CALLER --- THERE ARE NO SIGNS ADV'G LANE WILL BE CLOSED SB 101 AT TP GGB "
"[3] 1039 RFCC, REQ TO BE NOTIFIED WHEN RE-OPENED "
"[1] 14-63B INFO FOR FIRE AND SMPD - SB BROADWAY OFR IS CLOSED "
"[6] 23-R21 NB SR25 TO NB 101 ALSO CLOSED TILL 0600 HRS "
"[5] 23-R21 SB 25 OFR F/ SB 101 CLOSED TILL APROX 0600HRS"
"[1] BUS IN GP BETWEEN HOV AND BUS LNS "
